meta.title: Hotel Chalet Swiss Interlaken — Your Alpine Hotel
meta.description: Hotel Chalet Swiss in Interlaken — Charming alpine hotel between Lake Thun and Lake Brienz. Breakfast, sauna & central location. Book directly for the best rate.

entry.door_sign: Enter the World of Chalet Swiss

hero.title: Welcome to Chalet Swiss
hero.subtitle: Charming alpine hotel in the heart of Interlaken, between Lake Thun and Lake Brienz. Alpine comfort with Swiss hospitality.

booking_bar.title: Plan Your Stay
booking_bar.subtitle: Best price guarantee when you book direct

welcome.label: Welcome
welcome.title: Alpine Hospitality for Generations
welcome.text1: Hotel Chalet Swiss is located in the heart of Interlaken, nestled between Lake Thun and Lake Brienz. Our charming alpine hotel combines traditional Swiss hospitality with modern comfort.
welcome.text2: Enjoy our generous breakfast buffet, relax in our sauna, and explore the breathtaking mountain scenery of the Bernese Oberland right on your doorstep.

rooms.label: Our Rooms
rooms.title: Choose Your Perfect Room
rooms.subtitle: From cosy single rooms to spacious family rooms — find your perfect home in the mountains.
rooms.desc_single: Cosy room for solo travellers with all the comfort for a relaxing stay in the heart of Interlaken.
rooms.desc_standard_double: Comfortable double room with everything you need for a pleasant stay. Perfect for couples.
rooms.desc_superior_double: Spacious room with premium amenities including minibar and safe. Our most popular room category.
rooms.desc_superior_twin: Elegant twin room with private balcony and stunning mountain views. Two comfortable single beds for flexible sleeping arrangements.
rooms.desc_family_3: Spacious family room with three single beds, ideal for small families or groups. All the comforts for a relaxed stay.
rooms.desc_family_4: Our largest family room with 3-4 beds and a private balcony. Crib available on request. Ideal for families with young children.

pricing.title: Prices and Reservation
pricing.subtitle: All room prices include breakfast buffet, service charges, taxes, and VAT.
pricing.includes: Breakfast buffet, service charges, taxes & VAT included
pricing.dogs: Dogs stay free — please note they are not allowed in the breakfast room
pricing.loyalty: Loyalty discount: 10% off from your 3rd stay (min. 3 nights)

dining.label: Breakfast
dining.title: Start Your Day Right
dining.text: Our generous breakfast buffet treats you every morning with fresh bread, local cheeses, homemade jams and much more. Enjoy your breakfast with views of the mountains.
dining.menu_subtitle: Swiss specialities served in a cosy atmosphere
dining.fondue_desc: Traditional Swiss cheese fondue with Gruyère & Vacherin, served with fresh bread and accompaniments.
dining.fondue_wine_desc: Cheese fondue for two including a bottle of selected Swiss wine — the perfect experience.
dining.raclette_desc: Original Valais raclette with potatoes, gherkins and pearl onions.
dining.flammkuchen_desc: Crispy Alsatian-style tarte flambée with crème fraîche, bacon and onions.
dining.pizza_desc: Fresh from the oven — various pizzas with homemade dough and top-quality ingredients.
dining.noodles_desc: Quick snack anytime — hot water included.
dining.menu_note: Lunch and dinner available on request. Please let us know when booking or at reception.

wellness.label: Wellness
wellness.title: Relax After a Day in the Mountains
wellness.text: After an active day in the Jungfrau Region, our in-house sauna awaits you. Unwind and enjoy the soothing warmth for body and mind.

location.label: Location
location.title: In the Heart of Interlaken
location.subtitle: The perfect base for excursions to the Jungfrau Region and the Bernese Oberland.
location.desc: Interlaken is the gateway to the Jungfrau Region, a UNESCO World Heritage site. From our hotel, you can reach Switzerland's most popular destinations in just minutes.

booking.no_offers: No availability for the selected dates. Please try different dates.
booking.unable_to_check: Unable to check availability right now.
booking.server_waking: Our booking server is waking up (~30 seconds on first load). Please click "Search" again in a moment.
booking.error_help: Please try again or contact us at chaletswiss@amanthos.com
booking.validation_valid_email: Please enter a valid email address.
booking.validation_fill_required: Please fill in all required fields (First Name, Last Name, Email).
booking.error_booking_failed: Booking failed. Please try again or contact us.
booking.promo_covers_full: Your promo code covers the full amount. Your reservation is confirmed!
booking.confirmation_email: A confirmation email will be sent to
booking.not_confirmed_yet: You do not have a valid booking yet!
booking.will_be_cancelled: Without payment, the booking will be cancelled in 10 minutes.
booking.payment_instruction: Please complete your payment now to confirm your reservation. Click the button below to pay securely.
booking.payment_secure_note: A secure payment window will open. Please complete the payment there.
booking.cancelled_no_payment: Payment was not completed. Your reservation has been cancelled.
booking.cancelled_rebook: You can make a new reservation at any time.
booking.confirmation_email_sent: A confirmation email has been sent to you.
booking.payment_link_expired: Payment link could not be generated. Please retry.
booking.upsell_roses_champagne_desc: Bouquet of roses with champagne — ready in your room
booking.upsell_fondue_2_wine_desc: Cheese fondue for two incl. bottle of wine
booking.upsell_raclette_1_desc: Original Swiss raclette for one person

trust.label: Why Book Direct?
trust.title: Best Price Guarantee When You Book Direct
trust.guarantee_desc: Book directly and get the guaranteed best available rate. No hidden fees.
trust.secure_desc: SSL-encrypted payment via Adyen. Your data is safe with us.
trust.instant_desc: Receive your booking confirmation immediately by email. No waiting, no hassle.

cta.title: Ready for Your Stay in the Alps?
cta.subtitle: Book directly and secure the best rate for your Bernese Oberland experience.
cta.reassurance: No credit card required to search · Best price guarantee when you book direct

footer.brand_desc: Charming alpine hotel in the heart of Interlaken, between Lake Thun and Lake Brienz.

cookies.text: We use essential cookies for functionality. No tracking cookies.
